summary: Email notification system fully tested and verified. All 7 backend API tests passed. Gmail SMTP is properly configured and emails are being sent successfully for: new bookings (2 emails - admin + client), approvals (1 email to client), and rejections (1 email to client). Frontend booking form and admin dashboard load correctly. SMTP status is displayed in admin UI as 'Gmail SMTP activo'.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 test bookings via API: TEST_EmailTest_{uuid}, TEST_ApprovalTest_{uuid}, TEST_RejectionTest_{uuid} - all with prefixed names for easy cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email notification system is fully functional. Gmail SMTP configured with host=smtp.gmail.com, port=587, TLS enabled. All email flows tested: new booking (2 emails), approval (1 email), rejection (1 email). Email logs have proper delivery_status='sent' and mode='smtp'. Admin settings endpoint returns correct SMTP config with smtp_password_configured=true and email_mode='smtp'.

email_flows_tested.booking_approval: 1 email sent to client with delivery_status='sent'
email_flows_tested.booking_rejection: 1 email sent to client with delivery_status='sent'

verified_features.email_logs_endpoint: No null delivery_status values found, all logs have proper status
verified_features.admin_dashboard: Loads correctly, shows 'Modo email: Gmail SMTP activo' badge
verified_features.booking_form: Loads correctly with program selection, calendar, form fields, and file upload sections
